name: StreamSavers
short_description: A desktop overlay idle RPG where your apps become enemies, Twitch chat unleashes chaos, and you hatch heroes from a pool of 256 collectible defenders to save your PC while you work, play, and stream.
detailed_description:
Your desktop is under siege.
Every app you open can become an enemy. Every emote can become a target. Hatch eggs, unlock heroes, and turn your real PC into a live battlefield while you work, play, and stream.

The Desktop has been breached.

Corruption spreads through the Desktop Wastes, the Browser Borderlands, the Task Manager Depths, the System Core, and The Void Kernel. Guided by Sir Cache-a-Lot, the last stable mind left in the machine, you must build a roster strong enough to push back the invasion before the entire system collapses.

StreamSavers Desktop transforms your real desktop into the battlefield. Your heroes fight on top of the screen you already use every day, battling while you browse, game, work, and stream. This is not a separate world hidden behind menus. Your machine is the world. The battle unfolds across the surface of your actual PC in real time.

Open an app, and it can appear in the game as a living enemy carrying its real icon. Go about your day, and the game reacts to your activity using counts only for things like clicks, scrolling, and window swaps, never what you are actually doing on screen. It makes the whole experience feel alive, like your desktop has become a fantasy warzone hiding in plain sight.

Then Twitch joins the fight.

Chat doesn’t just watch in StreamSavers Desktop - it changes the battle. Twitch emotes, BTTV, FFZ, 7TV, and emoji can drop into the overlay as attackable objects your heroes can smash apart. Viewer rewards can trigger Coin Shower, Summon Boss, Team Heal, Gold Rain, Enemy Swarm, Double Coins, Mystery Loot, and Screen Shake, turning every stream into a live event where the audience helps, sabotages, and fuels the chaos.

Behind the hook is a full progression RPG. Hatch from 46 egg variants to unlock heroes from a pool of 256 collectible characters across 7 classes. Expand your roster one hatch at a time, then turn duplicate pulls into Shards that power star-level progression. Unlock a 64-ability Spellbook with 39 spells, 11 specials, 5 passives, and 9 ultimates, then equip 4 active abilities to shape how your team fights.

The loot chase runs deep too. Collect 320 weapon variants, 31 offhands, and 13 projectiles, then salvage gear, reroll perks, merge duplicates, upgrade rarities, socket gems, and enchant your best finds. Whether you love collecting, optimizing builds, or slowly building an unstoppable anti-virus army, there is always another upgrade to chase.

Long-term progression keeps the battle going with 159 quests, daily bounties, 15 achievements, 32 perks, 7 perk synergies, 10 gem types, 5 camp upgrades, and 5 prestige levels. Whether you want a living desktop companion, a deep collection grind, or a stream-powered chaos machine, StreamSavers Desktop keeps your screen alive with action.

Your desktop is no longer where the game starts.
Your desktop is the game.

Key Features

  • Turn your real desktop into the battlefield with a live overlay RPG that fights while you work, play, and stream.

  • Hatch from 46 egg variants and unlock heroes from a pool of 256 collectible characters across 7 classes.

  • Strengthen your roster with duplicate hatches that become Shards for star-level progression.

  • Battle across 5 corrupted regions: Desktop Wastes, Browser Borderlands, Task Manager Depths, System Core, and The Void Kernel.

  • Unlock 64 abilities, including 39 spells, 11 specials, 5 passives, and 9 ultimates.

  • Equip up to 4 active abilities to shape your squad’s combat style.

  • Let real apps spawn icon-carrying enemies directly from your system.

  • React to your daily activity using counts only for clicks, scrolling, and window swaps, never the content on your screen.

  • Bring Twitch into the fight with emotes, viewer rewards, and real-time chaos.

  • Trigger 8 viewer reward effects including Coin Shower, Summon Boss, Enemy Swarm, Team Heal, and Mystery Loot.

  • Chase deeper loot progression with 320 weapon variants, 31 offhands, 13 projectiles, gems, sockets, rerolls, upgrades, scrolls, and enchantments.

  • Push through 159 quests, daily bounties, 15 achievements, 32 perks, 5 camp upgrades, and 5 prestige levels.
